title: Majora's Block
body:
![Majora's Block Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbe05be36597e95d9459efb025b1a844e84c7e15.png)

# A Hint of Hyrule for 1.21.9 - 1.21.11 🍃

**Majora’s Block** is a subtle resource pack with _small nods to The Legend of Zelda_ that blend seamlessly into the vanilla experience.

- Small Zelda-inspired details and references
- Keeps the vanilla Minecraft style
- Subtle changes to selected items and textures

### Preview:
